description: The entity authorizes, modifies, or removes access to data, software, functions, and other protected information assets based on roles, responsibilities, or system design and changes, giving consideration to least privilege and segregation of duties.

subcriteria.name: onboarding_access
subcriteria.reference_text: Onboarding checklist or access matrix showing which systems and applications new hires receive access to based on their role. Manager approval documented for initial access grants. Role-based access templates defined for each job function.

subcriteria.name: offboarding_revocation
subcriteria.reference_text: Offboarding procedure showing access revoked within 24 hours of termination. Termination ticket or checklist documents systems deprovisioned. Active directory account disabled, SSO session terminated, and application access removed.

subcriteria.name: periodic_access_review
subcriteria.reference_text: Quarterly or annual access review where managers certify each employee's access is appropriate. Review spreadsheet or tool export shows user, role, systems, reviewer name, date, and approve or revoke decision. Inappropriate access removed promptly.

subcriteria.name: role_based_access
subcriteria.reference_text: Role-based access control implemented with defined roles and permission sets. Privileged access limited to administrators. Least privilege enforced — users receive minimum access needed. Role changes trigger access review and modification.

mismatch_signals.reason: HR benefits onboarding document, not access management evidence.
A user list without review dates or approvals is not an access review.
